description_long: This is a large, multi-section wooden cabin with a modern rustic design, featuring a complex roofline with several intersecting gabled and shed-style roofs. The exterior is clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving it a warm, natural appearance, and the roof is finished in a dark, matte material. Multiple large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facades, allowing for ample natural light and scenic views. The structure includes a spacious covered porch area and an extended deck, with one section featuring a circular cutout, possibly for a hot tub or fire pit. There are several visible chimneys, indicating the presence of fireplaces or wood stoves inside. The overall layout is sprawling, with distinct wings and a blend of indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A sprawling, modern rustic wooden cabin with intersecting gabled roofs, large windows, and a spacious porch and deck area.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main facade with large windows and the primary entrance area beneath the overhanging roof.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the covered porch, main entrance, and the extended wing with a secondary entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive deck with a circular cutout and multiple rooflines converging at different heights.
description_view_3: Oblique view emphasizing the deck, secondary wing, and the arrangement of chimneys and roof sections.
attribute_roof_type: complex gable and shed roof combination with multiple intersecting planes, moderate overhangs, and dark asphalt shingle covering
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical distribution of large rectangular windows, with some grouped in pairs and others spaced individually across the facades; windows are mostly horizontal and vary in size
attribute_door_placement: main entrance door located beneath the covered porch on the front facade, with a secondary door visible on the side wing adjacent to the deck
